title: Cubic Realism
description: CB is a mod made with Mcreator, having the goal of revamping minecrafts realisim and magic. From perma ban swords to steelmaking and even lead poisoning, this mods goal is to have it all! (Yes that includes bombs).
body:
# Cubic Realism mod
This mod is focused on a **realistic gameplay expereance** while also **revamping minecrafts magic**. Please be aware this mod is very, very large and game **preformance may be affected** as well as **compatability and overlap with other mods** in a negative way due to how meny aspects the mod effects. It is recomended to play this mod with only with small/optimisation mods in addition. This mod use to be called hypermine for those who are following and now comfused.
## Features (Not complete guide)
crossed out = coming soon. Items and stuff from the mod will have a discription containing the value of the magic, rareity, specifications and aura (game mecanic).


### Thirst:
Hunger and health not enough? Say hello to thirst, the second most anoying and important prioroty in this mod. Right click on a water sorce block to drink it, but beware of diryness in water... To pureify water get a canteen or water bottle and heat it in a furnace. You can also get water from eating watery foods and vise versa.

### Blood/bleeding:
Bleeding hurts! When dammage is taken you will get the bleeding effect. It will make you faster, but take dammage over time as well as giving you the glowing effect. After the bleeding effect has cleared, the healing effect will take place and depending on your hunger, heal your lost health. Gore and blood are particles in the mod but can be turned off (see gamerules section)

### Statuses:
The less health, hunger and water the more pain! New statuses will apear in the right hand corner of your hotbar above you hotbar and the worse they get the more debufs you will get!

### Spider buffs:
Spiders can give you the new webed effect and it means whenever you take dammage a temporary cobweb will be placed at your feet!

### Be scared, blighted, strangthed and fusion mob be roaming!
Some mobs will now have uncommon (blighted or stranthed) and rare (fusion) varyants.These mobs will have some extra powers but give rewarding loot.

### Gamerules:
- blood and gore: Enabled by defalt, if true will show blood and gore.
- flying debris spawn: Enabled by defalt, if true will spawn flying debris when an exploison ocurs

### Lead:
Will be uncovered in game

### Radiation:
Will be uncovered in game

### Steel:
Will be uncovered in game

### Economy:
Will be uncovered in game

### Mobs:
Will be uncovered in game

### IMPORTANT STUFF:
Including this mod in modpacks: allowed Just give good credit. Only port to other modloaders and with credit. DO NOT REDISTRIBUTE WITHOUT CHANGING THE ORIGINAL. OFFICAL/ORIGINAL BY NINJACAT300A.
**NOTE: The curent version is in BETA so don't expect too much but from the mod curently. Made with Mcreator (great modmaker, check it out please!): https://mcreator.net/**
